title: The Developer Operating System
summary: An introduction to the mental model, practical workspace, and file system navigation of The Developer Operating System.
learningOutcomes: Understand the core abstractions of a modern developer workspace
Navigate directories and manage files using standard command line tools
Stage and version files using a local repository system
commands: ls - List contents of current directory

examples.code:
mkdir src
touch src/index.js
ls src/
examples.description: Creating a source folder and adding a script file inside it.

mistakes.title: Changing to non-existent folder
mistakes.solution: Check your spelling and use 'ls' to verify directory name before executing 'cd'.

quiz.question: Which command is used to create a new directory?
What does 'cd ..' do?
options: Create a folder named dot dot

challenge.title: Setup workspace and file
challenge.instructions: Create a directory named 'src', change into it, and create a file named 'app.js'.
challenge.successMessage: Challenge Completed! You set up the workspace.
